bridge_to_code.gap_description: GRANICUS_OPS_BUCKET env var references 'granicus-ops' bucket but no google_storage_bucket resource for it exists in Terraform state. Either the bucket is managed outside Terraform or the resource declaration is missing.

flags.reason: Cloud Run ingress is set to INGRESS_TRAFFIC_ALL, making the service publicly accessible. While OIDC auth is required for scheduler triggers, the /api/v1/ endpoints are exposed to the internet.
flags.suggested_fix: Consider restricting ingress to INGRESS_TRAFFIC_INTERNAL_ONLY if only Cloud Scheduler needs to reach the service, or ensure all API endpoints enforce authentication in application code.

flags.reason: GRANICUS_OPS_BUCKET env var references 'granicus-ops' bucket that has no corresponding google_storage_bucket resource in Terraform state.
flags.suggested_fix: Either add a google_storage_bucket resource for 'granicus-ops' to Terraform, or remove the GRANICUS_OPS_BUCKET env var if the bucket is no longer needed. If managed outside Terraform, document it as an external dependency.

flags.reason: Engine SA has roles/pubsub.publisher but all Pub/Sub resources in pubsub.tf are commented out. IAM binding grants permissions for resources that do not yet exist.
flags.suggested_fix: Remove the engine_pubsub IAM binding until Pub/Sub topics are provisioned, or uncomment and apply the Pub/Sub resources.

flags.reason: Deploy SA has roles/pubsub.admin but all Pub/Sub resources are commented out.
flags.suggested_fix: Remove the deploy_pubsub IAM binding until Pub/Sub topics are provisioned.

flags.reason: Deploy SA has roles/artifactregistry.admin which grants delete and policy management beyond what CI/CD push requires.
flags.suggested_fix: Consider downgrading to roles/artifactregistry.writer which grants push but not delete/admin.

flags.reason: Deploy SA has roles/storage.admin at project level, granting full control over all GCS buckets in the project.
flags.suggested_fix: Scope to roles/storage.objectAdmin on specific buckets if deploy only needs to upload pipeline archives.

flags.reason: Deploy SA has project-wide roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor, granting read access to all secrets, not just granicus-related ones.
flags.suggested_fix: Use resource-level IAM (google_secret_manager_secret_iam_member) scoped to specific secrets, matching the engine SA pattern.

flags.reason: Deploy SA has project-wide roles/iam.serviceAccountUser, allowing it to impersonate any SA in the project.
flags.suggested_fix: Scope to resource-level binding on only the engine SA using google_service_account_iam_member.

flags.reason: Deploy SA accumulates 8 project-level IAM roles with several granting broader access than CI/CD strictly requires (admin roles, project-wide secret access, project-wide SA impersonation).
flags.suggested_fix: Audit each role: downgrade admin to writer/developer where possible, scope project-level bindings to specific resources.

flags.reason: Cross-project BigQuery access to api-project-178709533099 is via credential files in Secret Manager, not Terraform-managed IAM. The actual permissions granted by the SA key are not visible in the Terraform state.
flags.suggested_fix: Migrate to cross-project IAM (commented-out resources in clients.tf) to bring BQ access under Terraform management and make permissions auditable.

flags.reason: Cross-project BigQuery access to paternitylab is via credential files in Secret Manager, not Terraform-managed IAM.
flags.suggested_fix: Migrate to cross-project IAM (commented-out resources in clients.tf) to bring BQ access under Terraform management.

flags.reason: Engine SA has roles/storage.objectAdmin which includes delete permissions. If the engine only reads pipeline archives and writes backups, objectCreator+objectViewer may suffice.
flags.suggested_fix: Evaluate whether the engine deletes objects from GCS. If not, downgrade to roles/storage.objectViewer + roles/storage.objectCreator.

flags.reason: Prune scheduler job has no description attribute in Terraform state (empty string). Purpose inferred from .tf comment only.
flags.suggested_fix: Add a description attribute to the google_cloud_scheduler_job.prune resource in scheduler.tf.
